description_long: This object is a pair of eyeglasses with a minimalist, rectangular frame and thin temples. The frame appears lightweight, with a full-rim design that encircles the lenses completely. The lenses are clear and untinted, providing a transparent view through both sides. The bridge is a simple, straight bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads or additional support structures. The temples are straight and slender, extending back from the frame without any visible embellishments or curvature. No brand markings or decorative elements are visible on the frame or temples.
description: A minimalist, rectangular pair of eyeglasses with thin, straight temples and clear lenses.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular frame, clear lenses, and straight bridge.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the thin temples and the full-rim frame design.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the frame and the straight, unadorned temples.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length and slenderness of the temples and the clear, rectangular lenses.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thin, straight temples and a minimalist, unembellished structure.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are clear and fully transparent, with no visible tint, gradient, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Simple, straight bridge connecting the lenses, with no visible nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative elements.
